item.text: {"has_findings":true,"actionable_count":9,"reason":"Actionable review findings remain. The current plan still leaves execution-ready build callable without bypass, does not define cache-first/rate-limit/live-refresh semantics, underspecifies date resolver and monthly eligibility, lacks explicit downstream label/path migration, does not classify every project script, omits a concrete orchestration step contract, lacks a concrete artifact DAG, does not address existing flag migration/backward compatibility, and only partially expands stale-path/no-subprocess tests."}
